name: Sleep
shortDescription: Delay the pipeline for a configured number of seconds, then pass the input through
description: Sleeps for the configured duration, then copies its input artifact through to its output byte-for-byte. Wire it between two nodes to delay the downstream stage — useful for testing slow pipeline stages, execution timeouts, and short-lived STS credential expiry. Note: sleeps longer than the STS token lifetime (900-3600s, operator-configured) will fail at the copy step because the injected S3 credentials expire.
inputDescription: Any single upstream artifact (typically parquet) to pass through after the delay

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this sleep node in the pipeline

duration_seconds.label: Duration (seconds)
duration_seconds.description: How long to sleep before passing the input through. 0 means no delay.

outputDescription: The upstream artifact, copied through unchanged
